offers.title: Binance Earn: Flexible and Locked Savings
offers.description: Earn yield on supported assets through Binance Earn flexible and fixed-term products. Rates, supported assets, and lockups vary by product.
offers.requirements: Verify current rates, terms, and supported assets before depositing.

offers.title: Binance Referral Program
offers.description: Earn a share of trading fees from eligible referrals. Commission structure can change based on account status and program terms.
offers.requirements: Review the current commission schedule on the official referral page.

offers.title: Coinbase Wallet Quests
offers.description: Complete guided wallet quests to learn onchain actions and earn token or NFT rewards when campaigns are available.
offers.requirements: Quest availability and reward size vary by campaign and country.
offers.notes: Use this instead of a generic Coinbase Earn label.

offers.title: Coinbase ETH Staking
offers.description: Stake ETH on Coinbase and earn network staking rewards minus Coinbase's commission. Availability and rates vary by jurisdiction.
offers.requirements: Check current staking support, rates, and jurisdiction limits in Coinbase Earn.

offers.title: Kraken On-Chain Staking
offers.description: Stake supported proof-of-stake assets on Kraken and earn protocol rewards. Supported assets and regional access vary.
offers.requirements: Check supported assets, current rates, and regional eligibility on Kraken.

offers.title: Kraken Fee Schedule and Volume Discounts
offers.description: Kraken's tiered fee schedule lowers trading costs as 30-day volume increases. Maker and taker discounts depend on your current tier.
offers.requirements: Review the current maker and taker tiers on Kraken's official fee page.

offers.title: OKX Earn
offers.description: OKX Earn offers flexible savings and structured products across many assets. Rates, terms, and supported assets change by product.
offers.requirements: Verify current rates, terms, and supported assets on OKX Earn.

offers.title: Bybit Promotions Hub
offers.description: Browse Bybit's active promotion pages for deposit, trading, and campaign-based rewards. Offer terms change by campaign.
offers.requirements: Read the active campaign terms before depositing or trading.
offers.notes: Promotion hub, not a single fixed bonus.

offers.title: KuCoin Earn
offers.description: KuCoin Earn provides flexible savings and campaign products across supported assets. Rates and availability change frequently.
offers.valueLabel: Variable by asset - check KuCoin Earn
offers.requirements: Verify current APY, lockups, and supported assets on KuCoin Earn.

offers.title: Gate.io Earn
offers.description: Gate.io Earn includes flexible products and lending-style earning options across supported assets. Terms and yields vary by product.
offers.requirements: Check current product terms and supported assets on Gate.io Earn.

offers.title: Uniswap Liquidity Pools
offers.description: Provide liquidity to selected Uniswap pools and earn trading fees. Returns depend on pool activity, fees, and your position management.
offers.requirements: Understand impermanent loss and smart contract risk before providing liquidity.
offers.notes: Reclassified from launchpad to DeFi yield.

offers.title: Curve Liquidity Pools
offers.description: Supply assets to Curve pools and earn trading fees plus pool-specific incentives where available. Rates shift with pool composition and governance emissions.
offers.requirements: Check current pool composition and risk before depositing.

offers.title: Aave Supply Markets
offers.description: Supply supported assets to Aave markets and earn variable interest paid by borrowers. Rates change with pool utilization.
offers.requirements: Review current supply APR, chain selection, and asset risk before supplying.

offers.title: Bitget Earn
offers.description: Bitget Earn offers flexible and fixed-term products across supported assets. Rates and lockups vary by product.
offers.requirements: Verify current APY, lockups, and supported assets before depositing.

offers.title: Crypto.com Earn
offers.description: Crypto.com Earn lets users lock supported assets for rewards. Rates vary by asset, term, and account tier.
offers.valueLabel: Variable rewards by tier and term
offers.requirements: Verify rates, term options, and jurisdiction-specific availability.

offers.title: MEXC Events and Campaigns
offers.description: Browse MEXC's event hub for trading campaigns, fee rebates, and limited-time reward programs.
offers.requirements: Check the active campaign page for current terms and deadlines.
offers.notes: Promotion hub, not a single fixed incentive.

offers.title: Lido Liquid ETH Staking
offers.description: Stake ETH with Lido and receive stETH, which accrues Ethereum staking rewards while remaining liquid in DeFi.
offers.requirements: Review stETH liquidity, smart contract risk, and current APR before staking.

offers.title: Yearn Vaults
offers.description: Deposit supported assets into Yearn vaults for automated strategies. Returns vary by strategy and market conditions.
offers.requirements: Review the current vault strategy, underlying assets, and risk before depositing.

offers.title: Optimism Governance Participation
offers.description: Historical governance participation rewards and governance-specific programs for Optimism contributors.
offers.requirements: Not eligible for retail homepage placement.
offers.notes: Kept in registry only to prove exclusion rules.

offers.title: Arbitrum Foundation Grants
offers.description: Builder-focused grant and support programs operated by the Arbitrum Foundation.
offers.requirements: Builder program, not a retail homepage offer.
offers.notes: Kept in registry only to prove audience filtering.
